Open Collections are not supported on CUR8.io
CUR8.io is an aggregator of NFTs, not a marketplace
To discover NFTs, use the CUR8.io search bar or explore collections from across the blockchain
CUR8.io has over 7000 collections aggregated from across 16 blockchains

content.text: How do I set up my gallery on CUR8.io?

I'll help you set up your gallery! First, log into your CUR8.io account and navigate to the Creator Dashboard. Click 'Create Gallery' and follow our intuitive setup process. You can customize the layout, add descriptions, and organize your NFTs
How can I monetize my NFT collection?

CUR8.io offers several monetization options! You can enable NFT rentals, create curated collections, or set up revenue sharing. Head to your Dashboard's Monetization section to explore these features. For step-by-step guidance, visit our knowledge base at https://support.cur8.io/cur8-knowledge-base
What is Proof of Craft and how does it work?

Proof of Craft is CUR8's innovative system for verifying digital ownership and creativity. It helps establish authenticity and value for your digital assets. You can learn all about it in our detailed guide at https://support.cur8.io
